commands.author: wAngByg
commands.command: re-review. all findings addressed across 5 commits: (1) recovery gated to actual read/parse failures only — valid resets like [] do not trigger recovery, (2) fresh temp artifacts < 10s filtered to avoid racing active writers, (3) .bak and tmp candidates validated with lstatsync symlink/hardlink checks, (4) fs-safe test fixtures aligned with pinned writer contract, (5) hasatleastonesessionentry guard prevents empty/unrelated json from stopping the candidate scan, and (6) newest stale tmp preferred over older candidates. regression tests added for each scenario. ci all green.
commands.freeform_prompt: re-review. All findings addressed across 5 commits: (1) recovery gated to actual read/parse failures only — valid resets like [] do not trigger recovery, (2) fresh temp artifacts < 10s filtered to avoid racing active writers, (3) .bak and tmp candidates validated with lstatSync symlink/hardlink checks, (4) fs-safe test fixtures aligned with pinned writer contract, (5) hasAtLeastOneSessionEntry guard prevents empty/unrelated JSON from stopping the candidate scan, and (6) newest stale tmp preferred over older candidates. Regression tests added for each scenario. CI all green.

target.title: fix(sessions): recover store from backup and tmp artifacts
target.author: wangbyg
